notes:

2. Improved the display of Guild Chest information by removing portrait frames.
3. Other optimizations and bug fixes.

title: Hollywood Merge
notes:
Update Now for Exciting New Features!
- Episode 69 Is Here: After agreeing to part ways, could the story really end here?
- Yacht Pass Sets Sail on July 17: You'll have the time of your life on board and unlock exclusive rewards!
- Glitter Party Merge Event Starts July 20: Don't miss out on this spectacular party!
- Fireworks Ball Merge Event Opens July 28: Let's share an unforgettable night beneath the fireworks!
- New Theme Unlocks July 27: Hollywood's lit up and filled with balloons !

title: Rush Royale - Tower Defense TD
notes:
Update 37.0 is already here! What you can find there:
The Festival of Talents with the new legendary damage-dealing unit, Blazey!
Unique leaderboard rewards, the Coupons – your chance to receive real prizes!
And apart from that: the ability to start a season quickly; reducing the number of effects in battle; optimizing the notification system, and other improvements.
See you on the Isle of Rhandum!
